Should You Lose Weight?

Yes — lose 257 lbs

Health Assessment for 4'11" 380 lbs

Class III (severe) obesity poses the highest risk for premature mortality, severe cardiovascular disease, and complications from metabolic syndrome. Bariatric evaluation may be appropriate.

To start your weight loss journey, use our weight loss calculator to set safe targets. Our TDEE calculator can help you understand your daily calorie needs, and our calorie calculator can create a customized deficit plan.

Healthy BMI Weight Range for 4'11"

For a person who is 4'11" tall, the healthy BMI range of 18.5 to 24.9 corresponds to a weight range of 91 to 123 lbs. Your current weight of 380 lbs places you in the Obese Class III category.

BMI Classification Table

Classification BMI Range Weight Status
Underweight< 18.5Below healthy weight
Normal18.5 – 24.9Healthy weight
Overweight25 – 29.9Excess weight
Obese Class I30 – 34.9Moderate obesity
Obese Class II35 – 39.9Severe obesity
Obese Class III40+Very severe obesity

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What does a BMI of 76.7 mean for someone 4'11" tall?

A BMI of 76.7 for a 4'11" individual classifies you as Obese Class III. Class III (severe) obesity poses the highest risk for premature mortality, severe cardiovascular disease, and complications from metabolic syndrome. Bariatric evaluation may be appropriate.

Q: What is the ideal weight for someone 4'11" tall?

For a height of 4'11", the healthy weight range is 91 to 123 lbs (BMI 18.5 to 24.9). Use our BMI calculator to check any weight.

Q: How is BMI calculated for 4'11" 380 lbs?

BMI = (weight in lbs ÷ height in inches²) × 703. For 4'11" (59 inches) and 380 lbs: (380 ÷ 59²) × 703 = 76.7.

Q: How can I lower my BMI from 76.7 to a healthy range?

To reach a healthy BMI, you would need to lose approximately 257 lbs. A safe rate is 0.5 to 2 lbs per week through a moderate calorie deficit. Use our weight loss calculator to create a personalized plan.
